brand_identity.vibe: Premium, Minimal, Modern, Developer-focused, Technical, Enterprise-ready
core_principles: No illustrations. Use realistic product UI, charts, and tables for visual interest.
Strict weight restraint in typography. Rely on size, tracking, and monospace for hierarchy.
High density, data-rich interfaces built for power users and developers.
Subtle glowing accents and ultra-crisp 1px borders (Linear/Vercel style).

dashboard_shell.navigation: Collapsible sidebar with workspace switcher dropdown at the top. Use monospace tags for pro features.

marketing_pages.bento_grids: Use 1px borders with dark surface backgrounds. Insert glowing radial gradients on hover (Aceternity style).

docs_portal.layout: Three-column: Left Sidebar (Nav) | Center (Content) | Right Sidebar (On this page)
docs_portal.code_blocks: Dark background always (even in light mode) for code blocks. Include Copy/Curl toggle buttons.

stat_cards.style: Minimalist rectangular. 1px border. No rounded corners larger than 6px.
stat_cards.content: Monospace label (e.g., 'EMAILS SENT'), large hero number (Geist 400), and a small green/red trend indicator (+12%). Small sparkline chart on the right.

tables.style: Full width, border-collapse. Bottom border on rows. Hover effect on rows.
tables.data: Highly realistic dummy data (email hashes, real domains, specific timestamps in monospace).

inbox_ui.layout: Split view. Left pane: Message list (sender, subject, time). Right pane: Message detail.

dns_records.style: Code-like blocks displaying Type (TXT/MX), Name, and Value. Include 'Copy' button on hover for the Value.

buttons.primary: Background #3ECF8E, Text Black, minimal padding, slight hover scale.
buttons.secondary: Surface background, 1px border, white text, hover background slightly lighter.

views_to_build: Marketing Website: Home, Features, Pricing, Docs Landing, About, Blog, Contact, Status, Enterprise
Authentication: Login, Register, Forgot Password, Reset Password, OTP Verification, Invite Accept
Onboarding: Welcome, Create Workspace, Domain Setup, API Key Generation
Dashboard Overview: Stat cards, Usage Charts, Recent Activity Feed
Email Sending: Compose, Templates List, Campaign History
Email Testing (Sandbox): Spam Checker, Previews, SMTP Testing
Temporary Email: Inbox List, Split-view Inbox Detail
Domains: Domain List, Verification DNS Records (SPF/DKIM/DMARC), Reputation
Logs & Analytics: Advanced filtering table, Deliverability Charts, Engagement metrics
Developer Settings: API Keys (Create/Revoke), Webhooks (Logs, Replay), SMTP Credentials
Workspace Settings: Team Management (Roles, Invites), Billing, General Settings
Documentation Portal: Interactive guides, API reference, Code samples
instructions_to_main_agent: Build BOTH Light and Dark mode using Tailwind's 'dark' class methodology. Include a theme toggle.
Do NOT use arbitrary illustrations. Populate marketing pages and empty states with realistic code snippets, terminal windows, or abstract 1px grid lines.
Implement the 'Supabase / Linear' typography rhythm: tight headers, monospace technical labels, zero bold text unless absolutely necessary.
Ensure all components have 'data-testid' attributes for automated testing.
Seed all tables, charts, and lists with highly realistic dummy data (hashes, real email addresses, exact timestamps, real-looking SMTP logs).
Use Shadcn UI extensively, but strip away the default 'rounded-md' shadows to favor a sharper, flatter, 1px bordered aesthetic.
For complex charts, use Recharts with customized minimalist tooltips.
